description: The xRegistry model for the pub.dev wrapper, describing the structure and metadata for Dart/Flutter package registries and packages.

dartregistries.description: A group representing a Dart/Flutter package registry provider (e.g., pub.dev). Contains all available Dart package registries.

packages.description: A resource representing a Dart/Flutter package in the registry, including its metadata and available versions.

name.description: The canonical name of the Dart package.

description.description: A short description of the package.

homepage.description: The main homepage URL for the package.

repository.description: The source repository URL for the package.

publisher.description: The verified publisher of the package (e.g., dart.dev).

sdk_constraint.description: The Dart SDK version constraint for the latest version.

flutter_constraint.description: The Flutter SDK version constraint, if applicable.

license.description: The SPDX license identifier for the package.

retracted.description: Whether this package has been discontinued.

name.description: The name of the dependency package.
The name of the development dependency package.

package.description: Cross-reference to the dev dependency package.

versions.description: A specific published version of a Dart package.

published.description: The UTC timestamp when this version was published.

archive_url.description: The download URL for the package archive (.tar.gz).

archive_sha256.description: The SHA-256 checksum of the package archive.

pubspec.description: The raw pubspec.yaml content as parsed JSON for this version.

sdk_constraint.description: The Dart SDK version constraint for this version.

flutter_constraint.description: The Flutter SDK version constraint for this version.

retracted.description: Whether this version has been retracted.
